_note: EXAMPLE ONLY, not applied automatically. This shows how a Claude Code user could allow read.sh to run without a permission prompt, while leaving call.sh (used for mutating calls) prompting as normal. The path below assumes the standard install from README.md (symlinked as ~/.claude/skills/logseq-api) — permission matching is a prefix match on the literal command text, so if you invoke this skill from somewhere else (e.g. running straight out of a repo checkout instead of the symlink), add another 'Bash' entry pointing at that path instead.
